prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: Closeout photos for E-303 Terminations & splices show the installed work following the referenced detail. Clearances, labels, supports, and terminations shown for this element are in place, and the inspection card has no open correction note. Source anchors for review: NEC 110.14.
title: T1 E-303 Compliant Code/spec compliance
